description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a two-tone handle. The head is made of steel, with one side presenting a flat, circular striking face and the other side forming a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is slightly curved for ergonomic grip, colored orange in the midsection and black at the base, likely indicating a rubberized or composite grip for comfort and slip resistance. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, suggesting a secure attachment. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or branding. Its size and design make it suitable for general carpentry and household tasks in urban environments.
description: A claw hammer with a steel head and an orange-black ergonomic handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the hammer head and the handle's curvature.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the claw and striking face visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the handle's shape.
attribute_handle_type: Curved ergonomic handle with an orange plastic midsection and a black rubberized grip at the base, designed for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Steel claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other.
